svg.text: Three years, same table. The shape changes from male-heavy youth to a flatter, older, nearly balanced driving population.
Male-heavy across the whole age profile. The teenage pipeline is broad.
The gap narrows. Midlife starts moving toward parity.
Parity arrives at 40-44. Older ages are female-heavy.
Source: FHWA Highway Statistics Table DL-220 via data.transportation.gov. Counts shown in millions of licensed drivers.
